additives_reference.name: Coffee Grounds
additives_reference.how_to_add: Toss in lye water to pull out color or add to oils before mixing in lye solution
additives_reference.notes: Adjustable based on desired exfoliation level

additives_reference.name: Orange Peel Powder
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Beeswax
additives_reference.how_to_add: Melt with hard oils and butters
additives_reference.warnings: Too much can make soap draggy

additives_reference.name: Oatmeal
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution
additives_reference.notes: Powder in food processor for less exfoliation

additives_reference.name: Honey
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to warm oils before mixing in lye solution
additives_reference.warnings: Can cause soap to accelerate or overheat

additives_reference.name: Cocoa Powder
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to warm oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Clay
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to lye water to draw out more color, or add to traced soap if swirling

additives_reference.name: Poppy Seeds
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Salt
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to HOT lye solution to dissolve

additives_reference.name: Corn Meal
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Ground Dried Herbs (Spearmint, Peppermint, Rosemary)
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Dried Flowers (Lavender, Rose Buds, Calendula)
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution
additives_reference.notes: Calendula stays yellow, lavender ends up looking like mouse poop, most others turn black/brown

additives_reference.name: Silk Fibers
additives_reference.usage_rate: 1 pea size pinch per pound of oils

additives_reference.name: Activated Charcoal
additives_reference.usage_rate: 1 teaspoon - 1 tablespoon per pound of oils
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution
additives_reference.notes: Amount depends on how dark you want the soap

additives_reference.name: Aloe Powder
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Milk Powder (Goat Milk, Buttermilk, Coconut Milk)
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Seeds (Apricot Kernel, Blueberry, Cranberry, Raspberry)
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution

additives_reference.name: Sodium Lactate
additives_reference.how_to_add: Add to oils before mixing in lye solution
additives_reference.warnings: Can make soap crumbly if you use too much
